_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Computer Software Product
summary: This Data Item Description defines requirements for delivery of computer software source code and documentation deliverables for software end items acquired for agency use.
description_purpose: Computer source code and documentation deliverables. To define requirements for delivery of software source code and documentation.
application_interrelationship: This DID contains the format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirements as delineated in the contract. These requirements apply to all software end items which are acquired for agency use.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

children.title: General
children.content: All documentation will be provided at a level of detail sufficient to provide a developer, with comparable levels of expertise, the ability to further develop the deliverable.

children.title: Format
children.content: The documentation shall be in the contractor's format.

children.title: Full description of all software supplied.
Instructions for using all routines and programs.
Installed on Government specified computer and operating system.
Tested on Government specified computer and operating system.
Compiled and execution ready object code for the Government specified computer and operating system.
